entry.title: Re: Harmonized Serial number profile introduced with Extended warehouse management (EWM) in S/4HANA
entry.content:
We using Embedded EWM and have activated harmonized serialization for our client. Business requirement is to have same number range for serial number and equipment master.

We have maintained number range object and number range number in serial number profile as we want to generate serial number and equipment master as per number range provided by client.

Issue: During goods receipt in EWM, we are able to create serial numbers automatically in inbound delivery, however goods receipt fails on ERP side with message that "Equipment Number not in external number range".

Appreciate your help on this issue.

Thanks

Amit

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Supplier Evaluation by Questionnaire (Soft Facts)
entry.content:
Thanks and hello @rajkumar, very nice explanation.

Is there a way to create a vendor own evaluation? I mean send a questionnaire to a supplier to receive information from them.

entry.title: Re: Managing Roadmap Task Updates In SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Hi!

How can I manage a change in the project scope?

entry.title: Study Guide for SAP Certified Associate - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud Certification Exam 2411
entry.content:
Abstract

This study guide is designed to aid in your preparation for the SAP Certified Associate - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud exam (C_C4H32_2411). This certification is intended for professionals who possess fundamental and core knowledge in SAP Commerce Cloud and can function effectively as part of a project team under guidance. It is ideal for business users seeking an entry-level qualification to work with SAP Commerce Cloud.

Overview

Before we begin, it's important to note that proper preparation for the exam is highly recommended. To ensure success, consider attending the following:

  • C4H320 - SAP Commerce Cloud Business User Training: This course contains ALL the essential content required for passing the exam. Enrolling in this course is highly beneficial.
  • Hands-on Practice System for C4H320: If attending the C4H320 training is not feasible, you can independently book this system. It offers practice opportunities with all the hands-on exercises from the training and provides access to all the training material PDFs.
  • Business User Certification Preparation Live Session: This live session features an instructor who reviews key exam topics and can directly address many of your related questions.

This exam covers the following 6 topic areas:

  • Product Content Management
  • Web Content Management
  • Commerce Management
  • Order Management & Customer Support
  • Integrations
  • Essential Foundation

Let's explore each exam topic area and its essential checkpoints in detail.

All Topics Walk-Through

1. Product Content Management (11-20%)

In this topic area, you should aim to understand the following:

  • Backoffice Product Cockpit Features: Gain a comprehensive understanding of all views (list/grid), functionalities, and toolbar actions, with particular emphasis on synchronization, Excel import/export, and cloning.
  • Product Concepts: Familiarize yourself with products, categories, catalogs, and catalog versions. Assess catalog management involving single or multiple catalog versions and understand performance characteristics.
  • Product Modeling Approaches: Explore type systems, basic and multi-dimensional variants, and classification systems.
  • Media Management: Focus on media containers and media formats, as well as conversion and storage processes.

The essentials links includes:

  • Backoffice Product Content Management - User Guide
  • Working with Catalogs
  • Product Modelling
  • Synchronizing Catalogs
  • Classification
  • Modeling Product Variants
  • B2B Multi-Dimensional Products
  • Digital Asset Management
  • Media Conversion

2. Web Content Management (11-20%)

In this topic area, focus on understanding the following:

  • Concepts of Base Stores and Related Items: Grasp the relationships among base stores, sites, product catalogs, and content catalogs.
  • CMS Components: Explore page templates, content slots, and CMS restrictions.
  • SmartEdit Features: Become familiar with various views such as pages, navigation, and homepage, along with the modes (preview | basic edit | advanced edit | versioning) for editing and versioning features.
  • Personalization Concepts: Understand segments, triggers, actions, and the configuration of personalization modules via SmartEdit and Backoffice.
  • Commerce Customization: Learn principles and applications of personalized search and promotions.
  • Composable Storefront: Understand the working principles and the communication process between composable storefront and SAP Commerce Cloud.

The essentials links are:

  • Overview of the CMS2 Data Model
  • Setting Up a Basic Web Site in the Backoffice
  • SmartEdit Features
  • Personalization Module Features
  • SAP Commerce Cloud, Composable Storefront Documentation

3. Commerce Management (11-20%)

In this topic area, your should develop a thorough understanding of the following:

  • Cart and Checkout Management: Familiarize yourself with the cart handling process and the various types of checkout options available.
  • Pricing Mechanism and Functionalities: Delve into the aspects of a price factory, price rows, and the evaluation priorities associated with multiple price rows linked to the same product.
  • Search Management: Understand the integration with the default search engine, focusing on index management, search box configuration, facets configuration, and the Adaptive Search perspective in Backoffice (including search profiles, activation sets, promoting items and boost rules, etc).
  • Promotion and Coupon Management: Learn about the setup and configuration of promotions, including conditions and actions, the evaluation process, the distinctions between single-code and multi-code coupons, and the role of coupons in promotions.
  • B2B Commerce Models: Gain insight into typical B2B data models, such as B2B users, units, cost centers, budgets, and credit limits. Also, understand B2B process support, including order approval with B2B permissions, quote negotiations, and punchout integration processes.

Here are the important links:

  • Search and Navigation Module Features
  • Adaptive Search Module Features
  • Promotion Engine Features
  • Coupon Features
  • Price Calculation
  • B2B Commerce Features
  • B2B PunchOut Module

4. Order Management and Customer Support (11-20%)

In this topic area, you should focus on:

  • Payment Integration: Understand SOP (Silent Order Post) and HOP (Hosted Order Page)
  • Basic Order Management Extensions: Explore functions such as standard order fulfillment processes, order replenishment, order splitting, and stock information management.
  • Order Management Services Module: Understand the configuration of various aspects, including Available to Promise (ATP), sourcing, and the default fulfillment workflow involving picking, packing, labeling, and shipment.
  • Assisted Service and Customer Service Modules: Learn about the features of the Assisted Service Module (such as creating customer profiles, managing shopping carts, and placing/canceling/returning orders) for storefronts, and the Customer Service Module (including managing tickets, approving reviews, and generating GDPR reports) in Backoffice.
  • Fraud Detection: Grasp the principles of the "game of points" system and the default symptom types used in fraud detection.

The important links are:

  • Base Commerce Module Features (Order Related Ones)
  • Order Management Features
  • Assisted Service Module Features
  • Customer Service Module Features

5. Integrations (<10%)

In this topic area, you should understand the following:

  • SAP Integration Pillars: Focus on the integration of data, process, and feature aspects.
  • Integration Scenarios: Examine different setups such as loosely coupled, pick-and-choose, and tightly coupled configurations.
  • General Integration Tools: Learn about various tools and services, including Impex, Cloud Hotfolder, OCC web services, integration API module, and Webhooks.
  • Integration Extension Pack: Identify the default support available for SAP solutions and systems.
  • SAP BTP Integration Suite and Kyma Runtime: Explore their features and underlying concepts.

More information in:

  • Introduction to SAP Commerce Integrations
  • Integration API Features
  • Cloud Hot Folders
  • SAP Commerce Cloud, Integration Extension Pack
  • SAP Back-End Integration Overview

6. Essential Foundations (21-30%)

In this topic area, you should understand the following:

  • Concepts of Extensions and Modules: Familiarize yourself with how extensions and modules function within the system.
  • SAP Commerce Cloud Architecture and Components: Gain insight into the structure and individual components of SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • License Management: Understand the nuances of using/managing temporary and production licenses.
  • Monthly Update Scheme**: Learn about the versioning system and the purpose, release process, and contents of each update, and how to stay current and supported.
  • SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud: Explore the differences and benefits compared to on-premises solutions, including environment setup and scaling support.
  • Backoffice General Functionalities: Get to know the general functions and GUI components, such as the top menu bar.
  • Management of the Validation Framework via Backoffice: Understand how to manage validation rules and processes.
  • Cronjobs: Learn about the definition, application, and execution of cronjobs.
  • Impex and Distributed ImpEx: Understand the definition, application, and execution of Impex, along with the concept and advantages of distributed ImpEx.
  • Workflows and Collaboration Center: Learn how to define, manage, and monitor workflows within Backoffice.
  • Security Management:
    • User Management (principals, user groups)
    • Type-based Access Rights
    • Restrictions and Personalization Rules
    • HAC Access Customization
    • Password Policies and Change Audits
  • GDPR Support and Components: Understand the features and components that ensure GDPR compliance.
  • Intelligent Selling Services: identify the basic features and integration with SAP Commerce Cloud, especially the types of product recommendations provided.
  • Out-of-the-Box Features of B2C and B2B in Composable Storefront**: Familiarize yourself with the ready-to-use features available for B2C/B2B scenarios.

Here are the essential links:

  • Data Management with ImpEx
  • The Cronjob Service
  • Data Validation Framework
  • Workflow and Collaboration
  • Access Rights
  • Restrictions
  • SAP Commerce Cloud Architecture
  • Environment Components
  • License
  • Supported Releases
  • Update Releases
  • Intelligent Selling Services
     

Summary

By thoroughly exploring the above topic areas and the included links, you'll be well-prepared for the SAP Certified Associate - Business User - SAP Commerce Cloud exam.

Good luck on your certification journey, and may your hard work pay off!

entry.title: Re: Issue with Creating an Situation Type for Outbound Delivery Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi @kk_19, please explain the business process you'd like to get accomplish, not just technical implementation details. For outbound delivery, we do have APIs available (at api.sap.com) that appear to work well for most customers. "Updates" of outbound deliveries, what exactly do you mean by those? Lost shipments? Status changes during shipping? ASN might be covering situations like those if appropriate for the contractual obligation

entry.title: Error when modifying SY-SUBRC in S/4HANA Cloud Public systems using Eclipse debugger
entry.content:
Hi guys,

When I try to modify system variable SY-SUBRC in S/4HANA Cloud Public systems using Eclipse debugger, I get the following error message:

Important points to mention:

  • I did a test in 3 different Cloud Public systems, all of them showed the same error.
  • I tried on some On-Premise systems and was allowed to modify the variable without any issues.
  • I searched for posts or SAP Notes talking about any restriction, but didn't find anything.
  • I'm allowed to modify any other variable

Does anyone know anything about this issue?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Bug with Build Apps Community Edition Page disappearing
entry.content:
Every time I try to edit my page variable for my "recipeEdit" page, the page disappears. The page is still there, and I can make changes to it, but the UI is gone. I can still see the page in preview with new changes. When I restore, the page comes back. But as soon as I try to change a page variable, it goes away again. Any Ideas?

 

Ever

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration Cloud Foundry: Integration Content API not available
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I hope all of you are doing well.

I have stumbled across the Integration Content API for SAP Cloud Integration, and it looks really promising:

https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/overview, 

I have tried to access this API from my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant, which is running as part of Integration Suite on Cloud Foundry. For the record I have not enabled SAP API Management, but according to most of the blogs I have read it does not seem to me that it is required. 

When I try to call the API endpoint just to see if I can reach it, I receive an HTTP 404 - Not Found. The URL I tried is:
https://<sub account name>.integrationsuite.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/IntegrationPackages

I have also used the following URL, and this gives me an Odata response with a bunch of Entity Sets, but the entity sets related to SAP Cloud Integration are not listed (for example the IntegrationPackages entity set is not there).

https://<sub account name>.integrationsuite.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1

I have gone through countless amounts of SAP blogs and SAP Help documents, and they all highlight that the API should just be available for SAP Cloud Integration with no instructions to enable the integration content to be made available. This makes me think that I have the incorrect DNS\host name in the API URL I am trying to call.

So, to my question: Do I need to do anything specific to enable this Integration Content API for my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant?

If yes, will someone please be so kind to provide me with instructions on what is required?

If no, will someone please explain to me what is the correct URL I should use to access this API for my local SAP Cloud Integration tenant?

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Build Custom Journal Entry Posting Service Based On I_JournalEntryTP By Creating Own RAP Object
entry.content:
@TakeZhou :

I am trying to perform reverse action but getting error that it can't be called in save method need to call in commit task or rollback task. Did you ever try this.

entry.title: Re: Functional Buttons Disappear in SAP Screen Personas w...
entry.content:
If this is a flavor that existed earlier, then the reason may be some other change happening in the system. Based on what you described, apparently it is the flavor that somehow hides these buttons while using MOBGUI. 

What is the situation when you run the same flavor via regular webgui? Is the problem still present?

Also, try creating a new flavor (obviously not in MOBGUI), and see if after seeing it working OK in webgui, what happens when the flavor is applied in MOBGUI. If there is no such problem and those buttons are still visible, then you need to look at that problematic flavor and fix the issue by editing it.

entry.title: Re: SalesCloud Org Structure - Org Units: In which report...
entry.content: Daniel in my system I can see all the org. units using the CODPARTY data source, but you're right the 'Address_line_X' are not available - only House Number, Street, City etc have been exposed. Worth a check with the SAP support team if they can expose these additional fields

entry.title: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS giving random result
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS in our custom FM to create deliveries. Custom FM is calling by RFC call. We have two scenarios when the standard FM generates different results:

1. When we send package from external system with Sales Order number and only 1 line item (in Sales Order in SAP we have 5 line items) there is created delivery for all 5 items. Then when we delete this delivery and send the package with 1 line item again for the same Sales Order there is created delivery with only 1 line item as expected. Same result when we set a break-point and checking in debug mode the variables - everything is fine.

2. Similar situation with order consolidation: we send package from external system with 2 Sales Orders: for the first time system creates only 1 delivery for 1 of the orders, when we delete  delivery and send same package again - it creates one consolidated delivery for both orders. And again with external break-point everything is working as expected from the first attempt.

We placed wait parameter for 1 second before FM but no success. Also we checked some old enhancements in standard FM for some logic, but did not find any impact. Checked external system, the packages of the data sent to SAP with RFC are always the same.

If somebody faced with such issue in the past, could you please share your experience and thoughts.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: ES version, if there are more than 100,000 fixed asse...
entry.content: 在公共云 ERP 中，系统可能会自动适应吞吐量和性能要求。请监控吞吐量和性能，并在您的系统需要更多许可证时与您的 SAP 客户经理联系。谢谢。

entry.title: Re: OData Service from CDS-View: CONVERSION_EXIT_SDURA_OUTPUT Error
entry.content: Thank you so much! it worked it after i deleted that column from the entity type . Now i Can proceed with my test. Thanks again .

entry.title: Operator Alert Triggering and CIT creation
entry.content:
Hi experts!
On a consumption processing, I am trying to use the operator Alert Triggering (to send a message to the sender (CPI)), and to create the CIT in CI.
It's not working... The CITs are arriving on CI without some informations like Contract Account and Consumption date, rising a error.
However, the Counters in CC were updated perfectly.
Is there a way to fix it, or it's not possible to have CIT in CI when using Alert Triggering ??

entry.title: Bank rejected the payment due to missing IBAN/SWIFT number
entry.content:
Hi,

My user executed payment run on F110 to a vendor and vendor master is updated with correct bank account number and SWIFT code. However, bank rejected the payment stating IBAN is missing and they sent the screenshot of XML file batch where other vendors had IBAN and this particular vendor section did not have IBAN.

Can someone help me to resolve this issue?

entry.title: RBP config workbook
entry.content:
Hi,

Wanted to check if there's a provided RBP workbook template for implementation documentation?

Pam

entry.title: Re: Create New Controlling Area in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Using the Country CoA for countries like China and Vietnam, which have government-mandated CoA structures, is quite challenging in practice. In the PCE version, the Controlling Area is separated to implement these countries.

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Calculation not reading actual values
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have a scenario where we have to create a data action with if statement as below:

MEMBERSET [d/Measures]=("Budget","Ultimate","Committed_In_SAP","Not_Committed_In_SAP")
 
VARIABLEMEMBER #Tot_Com OF [d/Measures]
DATA([d/Measures]=#Tot_Com) = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Committed_In_SAP",[d/Version]="public.Actual")+RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Not_Committed_In_SAP",[d/Version]="public.Planning"))
 
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Budget",[d/Version]="public.Planning") = 0 THEN
DATA([d/Measures]="Ultimate") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#Tot_Com)
 
ELSEIF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Budget",[d/Version]="public.Planning") < RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#Tot_Com) THEN
DATA([d/Measures]="Ultimate") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#Tot_Com)
 
ELSEIF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Budget",[d/Version]="public.Planning") > RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#Tot_Com) THEN
DATA([d/Measures]="Ultimate") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Budget",[d/Version]="public.Planning")
 
ENDIF

The issue here is the values from RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Committed_In_SAP",[d/Version]="public.Actual" are being not read, result gives values only from RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Not_Committed_In_SAP",[d/Version]="public.Planning".

Can you help me guide what am I missing?

Thank you!

Lavanya.

entry.title: Re: How to Post Cost to a WBS Element for a Balance Sheet...
entry.content: We used the B/S Account Attribute as SAKO and the Field Group as SEC0 (All Fields Optional). We entered it in Manage Journal Entry.

entry.title: Error M8_2210 during MIRO. Item is not consistent
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am facing an error never encountered before while creating a MIRO document from a purchase order with category asset.

 

The GR has been carried out without errors as a result of the creation and approval of a Service Entry Sheet.

Even though the error text is somewhat explicative of a possible reason I don't understand how to act.

Does anyone happened to face this problem before?

Thank you

Peter

entry.title: Re: Cash Management: Liquidity Item Derivation in MIRO Tr...
entry.content:
Per my understanding, it is recommend to use Query/Query Sequence in OP release.

In addition, the 'Derivate Function' in Query/Query Sequence accepts customer logic.

entry.title: Google Auth remove account linkage
entry.content:
May I know how to remove the google auth linkage for one account. Since we found that there is no option to remove it when we login as admin to IAS. Can you kindly provide steps to remove the google auth linkage in IAS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Google Auth remove account linkage
entry.content:
You may follow steps in this document to unlink the account:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/social-authentication#unlink-a-social-provider-account

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content:
Lucy老師好，不好意思我沒描述清楚！
主要是客戶的架構目前是將分公司當成利潤中心
因此同一個物料可能A利潤中心和B利潤中心都會採購，所以想請問是否能將收貨分錄的利潤中心區分？
目前在採購單和收貨單都找不到利潤中心的欄位可以自行調整。
再麻煩您回覆了，謝謝！

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE in Public Edition
entry.content: Hi, I am from cloud WM development team and this issue indeed looks familiar to me. I will check with the expert and update here. Thanks for your patience. Kind Regards, Clark

entry.title: Key areas of change in C_TS4FI_2023 SAP S/4HANA Financials
entry.content:
The C_TS4FI_2023 SAP certification primarily focuses on the latest updates in the SAP S/4HANA Finance module, including new features like enhanced financial reporting capabilities, improved integration with other modules, streamlined processes for accounts payable and receivable, and greater emphasis on data analytics and machine learning within financial management - essentially reflecting the evolution of SAP Finance towards a more intelligent and automated system.

  • New General Ledger (New G/L):
    Significant improvements in the New G/L functionality, including advanced ledger capabilities, flexible chart of accounts, and enhanced reporting options. 
     
  • Universal Journal:
    Further development of the Universal Journal, offering a single source of truth for all financial transactions, providing better auditability and analysis. 
     
  • Automated Invoice Processing:
    Increased automation in invoice processing with features like intelligent document recognition and machine learning to streamline AP workflows. 
     
  • Customer Relationship Management (CRM) Integration:
    Deeper integration between Finance and CRM modules, allowing for better customer-centric financial reporting and analysis. 
     
  • Advanced Analytics:
    Enhanced analytics capabilities within Finance, including predictive modeling and real-time insights to support better decision-making. 
     
  • Cloud-based features:
    Greater emphasis on cloud-based functionalities within the SAP S/4HANA Finance module, enabling scalability and flexibility. 
     
 
Important points to remember:
  • Focus on digital transformation:
    C_TS4FI_2023 likely places a high priority on understanding how SAP Finance supports digital transformation initiatives within an organization. 
     
  • Data migration considerations:
    With new features, the certification may cover aspects of data migration from older SAP systems to S/4HANA Finance. 
     
  • User experience improvements:
    The latest SAP Fiori interfaces and user experience enhancements in Finance are likely included in the exam content.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Producer not playing
entry.content: Looks like it is opening the .js file as text instead of processing it. Check your file associations. Also clear your browser cache, in case that's it. Does this happen with all simulations, only some, or the entire Trainer?

entry.title: Re: Compensation Route Map

But I am more interested in your statement " Compensation route maps can have an unlimited number of steps that can reference any hierarchy (even a mix of line manager hierarchy with 2nd manager hierarchy)". I could see limited roles in the routemap. How I can define 5th level planner in routemap? Say 1st step is Employee, 2nd step is Manager, 3rd step is 2nd level Manager. What role I can add in 4th step?

entry.title: Re: Quality Notification process for Ariba Supply Chain Collaboration
entry.content:
Minor correction should be made in the diagram for Quality Inspection and Quality Notification. 

The Quality Inspection is Proactive and Quality Notification is reactive, thats what you want to say and figure is not showing it.

entry.content: it should be based on Availability group

entry.title: Restriction for Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to create custom business object. We able to created custom business object and have field "Plant" from Association to Business Object.

We already gave the authorization on business role for a specific plant, but we will still able to create new record using different plant with the one we set up.

Any Suggestion?

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: link sales order reservation to refurbishment order
entry.content:
Hello @alisa_schlossberg-majer 

Could you please provide more details about your business requirements to ensure better understanding? Additionally, why are you creating a sales order if your objective is to carry out a refurbishment activity?

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Performance Issues in SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP BW...
entry.content:
Hi User,

Please review the suggestions below:

  1. BW Query Optimization

    • Filter out only the required columns in the BW query to eliminate unnecessary data. This helps reduce the query load and improves performance.
    • Simplify composite providers and calculation views by removing unnecessary joins or calculations wherever possible.
    • Use aggregates or compressed data to enhance query runtime efficiency.

  2. SAC Story Optimization

    • Filter Dimensions and Measures: Ensure the story includes only the required dimensions and measures, reducing the data being processed and displayed.
    • Optimize Widgets: Loading multiple widgets (charts, tables, etc.) on a single page can strain performance. Simplify the story by limiting widgets or distributing them across multiple pages.
    • Performance Analyzer: Utilize the Performance Analyzer tool in SAC (accessible via Developer Tools) to identify and resolve bottlenecks in your stories.
    • Enable Caching: Activate story or model caching wherever possible. Precomputed data reduces query execution times and enhances overall performance.

entry.title: Re: theoretical question: a tiny portion of hdb00003/data...
entry.content: "deep knowledge of the HANA database and the datavolume_0000.dat file", that's exactly what I'm looking for. suppose this has already happened to a customer, recovering the 16kb is not possbile, out of the question. Can something, anything be done to extract some data, any data? where can I find some one with "deep knowledge of the HANA database and the datavolume_0000.dat file"? where can I get some help?

entry.title: Re: Unable to purchase CER006 certification subscription
entry.content:
It seems SAP is checking on this for India region. Check out the comments in the thread link below.

https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/not-able-to-purchase-one-attempt-for-sap-certification-exam-for-india/qaq-p/13961972/comment-id/58200#M58200

Is this situation appropriate?

Hi
I am also facing the same issue, I have tried to switch off assistant under Modification operations But I don't have that option, Is there any other solution for this. can you please help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Restriction for Custom Business Object
entry.content: You can make the plant field as normal field not key field then you can able to add for other plant.

entry.title: Re: Restriction for Custom Business Object
entry.content: Hi @Deepak_003! Thankyou for the response. We already make as a normal field but the authorization from business role still not able to restrict. For example : For Custom business object we only allow to use Plant A and cannot use Plant B. We already set the authorization on business role. But right now we still able to create using plant B. Do you have suggestion? Thank You!

entry.title: How to know where the document is placed in SOLDOC if only document link is known?
entry.content:
User only knows the document link which is used to display/download the document as below. 

https://<solman host name>:<Port No.>/sap/bc/SMD/SolmanDoc/<Client No.>?_CLASS=SMDDOCLOIO&_OBJID=<xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx>&_LANGUAGE=EN&_LIFECYCLE=<xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx>&_MODE=D&W

eg.https://SOLMAN1.OPENSTACK.NA-US-2.CLOUD.SAP:50001/sap/bc/SMD/SolmanDoc/001?_CLASS=SMDDOCLOIO&_OBJID=FA163E9EAEC61EDEB99F737052CB9493&_LANGUAGE=EN&_LIFECYCLE=FA163E9EAEC61EDCA2AF8616D9AB548A&_MODE=D

 

Is there any way to know where this document is placed in SOLDOC UI. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to know where the document is placed in SOLDOC if...
entry.content:
Option 1.

Open or download the document with the document link. The document name should be shown. Search for the document name in SOLDOC UI to see where it is used.

Option 2.

Use LOIO ID which is included in the document link to check the document name (DESCRIPT) in the table: SMDPHIO. Then, search for the document name in SOLDOC UI to see where it is used.

entry.title: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

After upgrading to MDK V24.11 for web, we've encountered a significant issue with the SQL API. When attempting to post data, we receive a "406 Not Acceptable" error. This problem did not exist in the previous version (V24.7.5), where we could post data without any issues.

We've tried setting the content type and other headers appropriately, but the issue persists. Has anyone else faced this problem with the new version? Any insights or workarounds would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: Hello Sijin, Thanks a lot for your comments, I will learn your reference step by step. But at this stage, could you please help to correct my original codes to make the run? Thanks again

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content: Hi Fang, 现在理解您的场景了，请问工厂是同一个吗？

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content:
@Aaron_LeeI have already mentioned whats the issue with your code. Please have a look again. Its the issue with Spaces for Dynamic WHERE clause passed.

Code should be:

gs_where = | carrid = '{ gv_carrid1 }' |

Instead of:

gs_where = |carrid='{ gv_carrid1 }'|.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a...
entry.content:
Hi,

We can set the user parameter for charging device in S4H Public Cloud by using App "Croatia Fiscalization : Maintain User Default Parameters" with Parameter ID "/CCEE/FISC_CD".

Please refer to below link for more details.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6bb5f95d7bf0435f9e5cb34bdb8e909e/4735dae28ac7426aa2a1bd30bbd4f087.html?locale=en-US&q=croatia+fiscalization


Thanks,
Monika

entry.title: How to integrate the international version of buyer address in the “From” field of the SBN Order
entry.content:
Hello. experts!

 

Our customer utilizes SAP S/4HANA integrated with Supplier Business Network (SBN).

While they are a Japanese company, they conduct business with international suppliers.

Therefore, we need to display the "From" field of the SBN purchase orders in English for these overseas suppliers.

 

The "From" field in SBN orders is mapped to E1EDK14[QUALF = 011] in the IDoc segment transmitted from S/4HANA.

In the ADRC table of S/4HANA, the company code's address number (ADRC-ADDRNUMBER) contains both a Japanese version (where ADRC-NATION is blank) and an international version (where ADRC-NATION is "I").

Could you please advise how to retrieve the international version of the address in the IDoc segment E1EDK14[QUALF = 011]?

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: @Sijin_Chandran are there any practice questions or sample papers that can assist in preparation other than that already provided by SAP?

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: @EzmaHafeezno as such! Only some Sample 10 questions I guess you can get from the demo page, if I am not wrong. These courses should suffice.

entry.title: Re: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer...
entry.content: Ok thanks

entry.title: Re: problem on paste data from clipboard to excel sheet
entry.content: any update?

entry.title: Grid Table Display Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content:
Hello,

We're experiencing a display issue with grid tables in MDK V24.11 for web. When creating a grid table without a grid header, the first column only displays one word of data. This issue was not present in the previous version (V24.7.5).

Has anyone else encountered this problem with the latest update? If so, do you have any suggestions or workarounds to resolve this display issue?

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: Hi shubh create a workbench request or transport of copies request in DEV system which is already on EHP8 and add all the effected objects in Quality to this request and import this request in Quality system. Post import remove it from the transport queue to ensure that this request does not move to the subsequent systems.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to display PDF by default in /OPT/VIM_WP image tab instead of XML?
entry.content:
Hi Yam,

We still don't have complete solution but we have done some analysis which might work as work around, we are currently working on attachment of new PDF and after that Display part will be done. i can give the solution once implemented and confirm its feasibility, but for now can you let me know how are you creating the pdf? are you converting the XML to pdf or attaching file from Al11?

entry.title: Unable to load the tile Maintenance Backlog Overview(F5105)
entry.content:
Getting error as below for the app Maintenance Backlog Overview.

  1. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading "oCrossAppNavService")

entry.title: How are Confirmation comments/records sorted in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello, experts!

This is question about a scenario where a supplier submits an Order Confirmation with multiple delivery dates for a single schedule line.

The supplier initiates this by clicking the "Split" button on the "Order to Confirm" tile, inputting multiple dates and comments before submission.

Based on our observations in our environment, the supplier's response is integrated into the S/4HANA Purchase Order in the following manner.

We would like to confirm if this is standard functionality:

1. Comments: The confirmation comments at schedule line level are sorted alphabetically and concatenated in the PO item text.

2. Dates and Quantities: The confirmation records in the PO Item Confirmation tab (EKES table records) are sorted by delivery date.

Additionally, if this is indeed standard behavior, we notice that the sequence of items in points 1 and 2 may not align. Is there a way to synchronize these sequences?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to display PDF by default in /OPT/VIM_...
Re: Custom Tab
entry.content:
Hi 

 

The menu path to access the SAP B1 UI Configuration Template is:

Administration > Utilities > UI Configuration Template.

This will allow you to manage and configure the user interface templates for different users and roles in SAP Business One.

Review the assigned users under the UI Configuration template.

entry.title: A Guide to Identifying the Table from which a CDS View Retrieves Data
entry.content:
When checking a FIORI issue, we can find from which CDS view data is fetched via F12. Now I will get you to find out from which table CDS view retrieves data.

For example, CDS view I_BP_CONTACTS and field PHONENUMBEREXTENSION.
Firstly, go to transaction code SE80, search  I_BP_CONTACTS.

Then in View Fields, we can find the field. Here let us double click on the Table "IBPCNTCTFUNCDEPT".


Finally we can see that the data is from but051- TEL_EXTENS

entry.title: Re: Unable to login to SAP Business One due database conn...
entry.content:
• Go to SAP Service Manager > License Manager > Settings > Configure Security, and log in to the System Landscape Directory by entering the B1 site user password.

  • Delete the exstitng server details and Add a new connection using the server's IP address.

  • After refreshing, all the databases appeared in the Companies section.

  • Following this, SAP started functioning on all client machines as well.

entry.title: Re: User login take long time
entry.content: Do you run any add on

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Calculation not reading actual values
entry.content: Is it possible user has no read access actual version?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Producer not playing
entry.content:
Hi Annie.

It's 10000% the Live Review extension that destroyed the trainer resource after the latest upgrade. 

Remove the Live Review extension Script and Dictionary, then revert the trainer resource in Manager. Not the trainer style, but the trainer resource!

I've seen this issue in my sandbox and in a few customers' systems.

If you need the latest Live Review extension, that works with the 2411 release, I'll send it to you via email.

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content:
Hi Lucy,

是的，是同一個工廠。

entry.title: Re: How to add equipment in logsheet
entry.content:
Hi Mohit,

User t-code "IEQCM1 - Change Equipment History"

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content: Check does the user have right General Authorizations

entry.title: Re: How can I create a view of a customer's payment history?
entry.content:
Financials>>Reports>>Accounting>>General Ledger>>select your BP code >>In expanded select Incoming

payments>>untick Accounts and mentioned other details as per your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Automate updates to my dashboard imported from an excel
entry.content: You can configure a file server, and create an import job to import data from the excel inside file server path.

entry.title: Re: Item Cost Not Displaying for a Specific User
entry.content: Hi, we already checked and confirmed that the user has Full Authorization on the Item Cost

entry.title: Event-Event Reasons
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Once Probation Status is marked as Confirmed, the Employment Type will change to Confirmed, and the column will freeze. No further changes can ever be made to make the employee probationer back.

entry.title: Re: About CoA data migration
entry.content: Hi，the link https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2022/apr/e_oe_te_w_ssc_24594.html is out of date, can you please double check?

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,I hope this message finds you well !

I have already registered and confirmed my participation in the Digital Skills Initiative, and I completed my learning journey in November, as per the rules. However, I have not yet received the free certificate redemption code. I have also reached out to digitalskills@sap.com multiple times and provided the necessary proof along with screenshots.

I kindly request you to look into this matter and assist me in resolving it. Your Instant response would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your support !

Best regards,

Hamza Abbas

entry.title: Re: New in Production Accounting – Event-Based Production Cost Posting
entry.content: Hi, in event-based overhead posting, there is no transaction/app to re-calculate based on actual cost rates of production orders. Workaround could be - use allocation cycle to adjust overhead on respective orders manually.

entry.title: Re: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content: Can you provide more details about what you are posting? Are you calling an MDK action or something else?

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: Hi imaad, thanks for your reply. The issue is that there are many objects involved, and it's difficult to manage them all. Is there any other way we can restore the EHP8 version as the active version in Quality?

entry.title: Re: link sales order reservation to refurbishment order
entry.content:
hello @Vivek_Savant  and thank you for the answer. I understand your question and I will try to explain it as well as I can.

basically we need the following:

we generate a sales order for a customer, selling a programmed board but we purchase the board unprogrammed, hence the requirement for a different material (unprogrammed board).

once this requirement is generated, we must program the board: usually this would be done with a make to order Production order but on this site we did not implement PP. the easiest way for the workers would be to use a refurbishment order since they are using this already.

in the refurbishment order I can enter my requirement: GI of unprogrammed board, work it, GR of programmed board which is what we need to do.

once the programmed board is in stock, we can send it to our customer.

the issue is that the generated requirement of the unprogrammed board from our sales order, does not disappear....

any ideas?

entry.title: open same reports with different parameter values
entry.content:
Hi guys

I have a basic report in CR for enterprise and it uses a parameter filled via URL for years

The report takes some time to load so my user runs it several times in different browser tabs to load simultaneously 

The issue is that it loads with empty parameter values as Crystal tries to load the same report with the same parameter and different values and that causes it to fail

Any ideas how to separate each run and get them to load simultaneously?

 

Regards

Shlomi

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content: I'm also facing the same problem, but for a specific sub-account. Tried with undeploy-deploy, redeploy, but nothing works.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle Missing Source Values and Default to Em...
entry.content:
Please try with map by default

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/map-with-default/qaq-p/5393237

entry.title: Re: SDK Code in Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

 

HANA is Case Sensitive, so your query should take that into account:

Select sum(*) from ODPO A
WHERE
A."CardCode" = "C00001' and A."Canceled" = 'N' and A."DocStatus" = 'O'
 
BR,
Matija

entry.title: Re: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content: Hello @bill_froelich we are posting the data test and its parameter for that we used form cell simple property for data entry and for posting data we are using Rest service send request action. In previous version MDK i.e. V24.7.5 similar action working properly posting the data but now after migrating the project to V24.11 it gives 406 not acceptable error. this is the action which we are using { "_Type": "Action.Type.RestService.SendRequest", "ActionResult": { "_Name": "PostReport" }, "OnSuccess": "/QA_DigiLab/Actions/ClosePage.action", "Target": { "Service": "/MyAPP/Services/SQL_Service.service", "Path": "path of post url", "RequestProperties": { "Method": "POST", "Body": { "created_by": "257576", "parameter_list": "{#Application/#ClientData/trainingData}", "report_Id": "{#Application/#ClientData/report_Id}", "result": "{#Application/#ClientData/result}", "status": "{#Application/#ClientData/status}", "test_Code": "{#Application/#ClientData/TestCode}" }, "FetchCSRF": true } } }

entry.title: Bulk alternate parts upload in BoM
entry.content: How to upload the Bulk no of alternate parts in the BoM at a single time.
